calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-14-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Oscar Miranda; 415-637-5517; defendant in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.

No other appearances. Defendant states that they did not see the court's tentative ruling and did not give notice to plaintiff's counsel that they would be contesting the court's tentative ruling. The defendant is provided a copy of the court's tentative ruling, and the court explains that if no proper notice was given to opposing counsel, no argument can be considered. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OSMAR MIRANDA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is DENIED. Motion is untimely and is not supported by admissible evidence.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Off Calendar

Brief In Support Of Application Of Plaintiff United Three Groups Inc. For Court Judgment
Off Calendar May-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Osmar Miranda.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:28 a.m.

Keith M. Velleca, Esq. appeared for plaintiff United Three Groups, Inc.
Douglas Kwan, President, CEO and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Velleca and Kwan appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Osmar Miranda.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Disgorgement of Payments to Unlicensed Contractor and Request for Treble Damages was filed October 26, 2021, and personally served on defendant Osmar Miranda on December 1, 2021.
Default as to defendant Osmar Miranda was entered on January 14, 2022.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 4, 2022.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff United Three Groups, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Osmar Miranda, as follows:

Damages - $125,000.00.*
Prejudgment Interest - $6,048.00.
Attorney Fees - $3,000.00.
Costs - $627.00.

Total - $134,675.00.

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 10:52 a.m.

*The $125,000.00 in damages is comprised of $115,000.00 in principal and $10,000.00 in "treble damages."

Brief In Support Of Application Of Plaintiff United Three Groups Inc. For Court Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Continued To May-05-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2022 Continued To Jul-27-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
